mapper.sql: id, dic_type_id, dic_type_name, dic_key, dic_value, customInfo, sort, status, createTime, updateTime
mapper.insert:
insert into t_dictionary
id,
dic_type_id,
dic_type_name,
dic_key,
dic_value,
customInfo,
sort,
status,
createTime,
updateTime,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{dicTypeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{dicTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dicKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{dicValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{custominfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_dictionary
dic_type_id = #{dicTypeId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dic_type_name = #{dicTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dic_key = #{dicKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
dic_value = #{dicValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
customInfo = #{custominfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_dictionary set dic_type_id = #{dicTypeId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dic_type_name = #{dicTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dic_key = #{dicKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, dic_value = #{dicValue,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, customInfo = #{custominfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort = #{sort,jdbcType=INTEGER}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select from t_dictionary
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dic_type_id = #{model.dicTypeId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dic_type_name like CONCAT("%", #{model.dicTypeName}, "%") AND
dic_key like CONCAT("%", #{model.dicKey}, "%") AND
dic_value like CONCAT("%", #{model.dicValue}, "%") AND
customInfo = #{model.custominfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
sort = #{model.sort, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
status = #{model.status, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
( dic_type_name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dic_key like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dic_value like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
order by ${orderBy}
order by id desc
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from t_dictionary
id = #{model.id, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dic_type_id = #{model.dicTypeId, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
dic_type_name = #{model.dicTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dic_key = #{model.dicKey, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
dic_value = #{model.dicValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
customInfo = #{model.custominfo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
sort = #{model.sort, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
status = #{model.status, jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
createTime = #{model.createtime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
updateTime = #{model.updatetime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND
( dic_type_name like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dic_key like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or dic_value like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or customInfo like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") )
select from t_dictionary where dic_type_id = #{dicTypeId,jdbcType=INTEGER} order by dic_key
